programme.title: Capítulo 195
programme.desc: Miguel tells Mía that he never feels right without her. The guys do a striptease. Simon asks Roberta to be his girlfriend and gives her a ring; she accepts and throws down Diego's ring. Franco and Alma surprise the girls by inviting the band Kubah. Valeria catches an unusual ride. Miguel tells Mía he wants her but wants it to be right. Lupita and Celina make up by giving each other a gift of their own making. Roberta tells Mía that it's obvious she's in love with Miguel. RBD performs.

programme.title: Capítulo 196
programme.desc: Diego is distraught over Roberta and Simon. Mía pretends to be drunk and kisses Miguel. Valeria had a nervous breakdown. Valeria makes Peter quit. Diego admits he's in love with Roberta. Miguel finds out that Mía wasn't really drunk and confronts her. Gastón reacts angrily when Mía ends their relationship. Simon tells the band they sold out on their concert at the Palacio. León wants the Palacio as his campaign spot. Camilo asks Celina out on a date. Gastón taunts Miguel. Alma confronts Valeria over the letter.

programme.title: Capítulo 197
programme.desc: Valeria denies writing the letter. Celina leaves school without permission; Renata tells her parents. Gastón harasses Miguel and threatens him with the information he gathered in Monterrey. Miguel demands Mía tell Gastón that she not dating him. Giovanni and Vico find out that Madariaga might be leaving. Diego begs Roberta for forgiveness and another chance or he won't do the concert; she agrees. Celina's father shows up at school and gives her an ultimatum. Hilda becomes jealous. Pepa thinks Peter is trying to take her job. Gastón calls Franco to meet. Mía tells Gastón the truth about Miguel. Peter tells Mía he sent the letter.

programme.title: Capítulo 198
programme.desc: Roberta asks Madariaga if he's leaving; he says no. Lupita tries to help Celina with her family troubles. León tells Diego he's searching for the RBD members. Peter tells Mía the letter was written by her mom fifteen years ago. Mía decides to move in with Alma. Galia tells Pilar she will go to therapy; and also that Madariaga is leaving after the year. Celina introduces Camilo and her father. The students help give a makeover to Hilario. Roberta decides to move in with Franco.

programme.title: Capítulo 199
programme.desc: No one believes Pilar when she tells them Madariaga is leaving. Alicia goes on a fake date with Hilario. Marcelino convinces Peter that he's fired. Mía tells her dad she ended it with Gastón. León approaches Alma about RBD. Franco gives Miguel a check for his tuition next year. Gastón reveals Miguel's revenge to Mía. Mía asks Miguel about his dad's death. Diego confronts Roberta about their love.

programme.title: Capítulo 200
programme.desc: Diego tells Roberta he's ready to confront his dad about her and the band. Gastón hears Celina throwing up. Tomás feels like his life is no longer enjoyable. Roberta decides to stay with Simon and not forgive Diego. Franco and Alma fight over Peter. Lupita tells Mía that she won't be going to Orlando. José and the others decide to hire an escort for Alicia.

programme.title: Capítulo 201
programme.desc: It's revealed that Celina has bulimia. Roberta beats up Pilar for saying Madariaga is leaving. Madariaga tells the kids he's leaving. The girls find an escort. Diego, Giovanni, and Tomás get Simon's number and find out he's married. Nico convinces Miguel to show Gastón he is on good terms with Franco. Pilar tells everyone Madariaga was pushed out. The kids go on strike for Madariaga. Alma tries to gather information on Simon. Gandia expels the scholarship students. Renata interrupts Madariaga's meeting to bring him back to the school.

programme.title: Capítulo 202
programme.desc: Mayra scolds the students who walked out of the protest. Madariaga offers his resignation in exchange for the kids not to be expelled. Diego mentions Simon's wife in front of him and Roberta. Madariaga's project is denied. León learns that the members of RBD go to Elite Way School. Giovanni and Tomás find Simon's address. After León's visit, Gandia awkwardly interrogates Diego. Diego gets Roberta to meeting Simon's wife.

programme.title: Capítulo 203
programme.desc: Franco tells Mía that Miguel refuses to accept the house or stay in Mexico. Hilda sees Alicia with Popeye. Alma and Franco once again fight over Peter. Yuli tells Nico she's not going on the family vacation. Mía asks Gastón to tell her what he knows, later he gives her an envelope with evidence against Miguel. Pilar tells Roberta that Diego will give up RBD names. Alma and Diego decide to work together to expose Simon; she sees Simon with his baby. Madariaga rather have the kids angry at him than tell the truth. The kids literally turn their back on Madariaga. Gandia thinks Hilda ordered the escort. Mía reflects on her precious moments with Miguel.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: One crew tries to rescue a greenhorn, and the fleet battles storm waves.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 1
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Top of the Bottom of the World: New Zealand Thar Part 2
programme.desc: With the help of guide and friend Remi Warren, Steven Rinella gears up for a massive climb into New Zealand's Southern Alps in pursuit of Chamois and Tahr. The hunters will travel light and base out of an alpine hut to find animals Steve has never hunted. Things turns adventurous quickly; with an impassable glacial river between Steve and his goal. But with hard work, Steve experiences a do-it-yourself high country hunt like no other.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: Hawaiian Honeymoon
programme.desc: Aloha! The Douglases vacation in Hawaii. But the daughter of the hotel manager needs to keep secret that she double booked the honeymoon suite. The "sweet" surprise? While Lisa and Oliver settle in, they are unaware that the other room is occupied.

programme.title: The Ex-Secretary
programme.desc: Oliver's heirloom watch is broken so he tries to find his ex-secretary Carol's address to ask her the name of the jeweler who fixed it last time. Carol is now working and living in Los Angeles, and we get a glimpse into her new life.

programme.title: Oliver Buys A Farm
programme.desc: In this classic series' premiere episode, New York City attorney Oliver Wendell Douglas (Eddie Albert) satisfies his desire for the simple life by buying a farm, much to the chagrin of his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor). John Charles Daly narrates the tale!

programme.title: Lisa's First Day On The Farm
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) brings his wife, Lisa (Eva Gabor), to their new home, a ramshackle farm near Hooterville, just outside of Pixley, where she gets to meet the town's oddball residents. Bea Benaderet, Edgar Buchanan and Frank Cady guest star!

programme.title: The Decorator
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) is ready to get farming, but Lisa (Eva Gabor) puts her foot down and says she will leave unless they can hire a decorator to fix the house! Meanwhile, Kate Bradley (Bea Benaderet) teaches Lisa how to make "hotscakes."

programme.title: The Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Is the Honeymoon period over already? The rumor mill has it that Lisa (Eva Gabor) has packed up and left Oliver (Eddie Albert). Actually, she went back to New York to close up their penthouse apartment. And Mr. Haney is up to his old tricks!

programme.title: My Husband The Rooster Renter
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) calls in a roofer, a plumber and agricultural expert Hank Kimball (Alvy Moore). All of them give the same appraisal of his farm: it's a disaster! Meanwhile, Mr. Haney (Pat Buttram) has a few chickens he'd like to rent out!

programme.title: Furniture, Who's Got The Furniture?
programme.desc: The Douglases are awaiting the arrival of their furniture and they don't know it, but Oliver's mother is on her way, too. But when the furniture is accidentally delivered to Mr. Haney's new place, he tries to sell their own possession back to them.

programme.title: Neighborliness
programme.desc: Planting season ends in three weeks and Oliver has yet to get his land plowed. Meanwhile, Uncle Joe (Edgar Buchanan) needs a new shotgun before duck hunting season starts and schemes to solve both of their problems...without Oliver knowing it.

programme.title: Lisa, The Helpmate
programme.desc: When Oliver (Eddie Albert) sends a sample of his soil to the State Scientific College, a report comes back that his farm contains ingredients never before found in soil. Could his soil problems just be cosmetic? Eleanor Audley guest stars.

programme.title: You Can't Plug In A 2 With A 6
programme.desc: Relying on statistics provided by the Department of Agriculture, Oliver (Eddie Albert) decides to plant wheat. But when he goes to Drucker's to buy seed, he learns the other farmers have a unique way to predict the best crop�Mrs. Ziffel's lumbago.

programme.title: Don't Call Us, We'll Call You
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a riff between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Parity Begins At Home
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat�because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Lisa Has A Calf
programme.desc: The cow that Oliver (Eddie Albert) bought from Mr. Haney is pregnant. Afraid that Haney will claim the new calf, Oliver and Eb decide to keep it secret...only to have the people of Hooterville think that it is Lisa (Eva Gabor) who is expecting!

programme.title: The Wedding Anniversary
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well, he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: What Happened In Scranton
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is shocked that Hooterville has no beauty parlor, and the Ladies' Every-Other-Wednesday Afternoon-Discussion-Club nominates her to make it happen. Of course, Oliver's mother is happy to help, even if it means underhanded tactics.

programme.title: Give Me Land, Lots Of Land
programme.desc: When Oliver's neighbor, Mr. Watson, decides to do some traveling, Oliver (Eddie Albert) buys the farm which adjoins his property, but not the house on it. Lisa (Eva Gabor) misunderstands and thinks the beautiful farmhouse is their new home.

programme.title: New Neighbors Meet The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: Wednesday Leaves Home
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The V.I.P.'s
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: Morticia, The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: Lurch Learns To Dance
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion, after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: Art And The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets A Beatnik
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family Meets The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: Mother Lurch Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: Uncle Fester's Illness
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she an Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family Splurges
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: Cousin Itt Visits The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family In Court
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: Amnesia In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Thing Is Missing
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: Crisis In The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: Lurch And His Harpsicord
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Beast Of Beacon Hills
programme.desc: With the identity of the Beast finally revealed, Scott and his friends are in a race against time to stop the Dread Doctors from implementing their final plan.

programme.title: Apotheosis
programme.desc: Loyalties are tested and new alliances forged as Scott and his friends work to stop the Beast before Beacon Hills is razed to the ground.

programme.title: Memory Lost
programme.desc: With graduation approaching, a supernatural force rides into Beacon Hills and crosses paths with Scott and his friends, while Liam discovers evidence of a new enemy in the high school.

programme.title: Superposition
programme.desc: While Scott, Lydia and Malia search for lost memories of a missing friend, Corey discovers a connection between his abilities and the Wild Hunt.

programme.title: Sundowning

programme.title: Relics
programme.desc: Scott and Liam protect the lacrosse team from an attack by the Ghost Riders while Lydia searches for clues that lead her closer to finding Stiles.

programme.title: Radio Silence
programme.desc: Trapped inside the Wild Hunt, Stiles reunites with an unexpected ally while Scott, Lydia and Malia discover Stiles’s Jeep may be connected to his disappearance.

programme.title: Ghosted
programme.desc: Scott, Lydia and Malia search for clues about the Wild Hunt in a mysterious place called Canaan while Liam and Hayden resort to drastic measures in the fight against the Ghost Riders.

programme.title: Heartless
programme.desc: Scott and Liam attempt to capture a Ghost Rider while Malia and Peter search for a way into the Wild Hunt.

programme.title: Fear Itself
programme.desc: Bernard (Ayre Gross) is haunted by images from his past and the tragic death of his sister...a death he caused. An experimental treatment brings positive results, but also a dangerous side effect: Bernard can now transfer his fear to others!

programme.title: The Joining
programme.desc: When a transport ship Captain (C. Thomas Howell) is rescued after surviving a devastating crash on Venus, strange things begin to happen when he returns to Earth. He did what it took to survive on Venus, but could the price of survival be too high?

programme.title: To Tell The Truth
programme.desc: A scientist (Gregory Harrison) in a colony on another planet urges evacuation when he discovers that a radioactive star will soon pass over. He has been wrong before, though, and at great cost. Will the truth be accepted in time to save the colony?

programme.title: Mary 25
programme.desc: Charlie Bouton (Tom Butler) and Melburn Ross (Michael Shanks) create Mary 25, a nanny robot. When Bouton falls in love with Mary and mistreats his wife, a woman whom Ross once loved, the lines between human and machine become dangerously blurred.

programme.title: Final Exam
programme.desc: A negotiator (Brett Cullen) tries to find out why a grad student (Peter Stebbings) is threatening to detonate a deadly, self-made bomb, unless the government kills five people for him. Why those five people? Is it revenge? And can he be stopped?

programme.title: Monster
programme.desc: Four telekinetic people are recruited by the CIA, who hopes to use their talents to assassinate a war criminal. Their powers produce unexpected side-effects; however, and the killers may soon find that they are the prey. Robert Guillaume stars.

programme.title: The Origin Of Species
programme.desc: When Dr. Nodel (Ron Rifkin) is joined on an alien ship by a small group of students to communicate with aliens, it appears that they’ve all been led into a trap. Have the aliens led them astray? Ryan Reynolds also stars. Sequel to “Double Helix”

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A battle cruiser is captured by the enemy Ebonites on planet N-1-8-4. Imprisoned, the crew is interrogated by The Voice, an unseen Ebonite. Who will be the first to snap? And what will happen then? Starring Maurice Dean Wint and Steven Bauer.

programme.title: Lithia
programme.desc: In the world of 2055, men are extinct. Preserved by cryonics, a man (David Keith) awakens in Lithia, a poor matriarchy. He’s welcomed, but when he upsets the natural order of things, the question arises: Can the world men be revived? And should it?

programme.title: Sarcophagus
programme.desc: When two archeologists (Lisa Zane, David Cubitt) discover a cocooned alien that suddenly begins to reanimate, the rest of the research team turns greedy, wanting to cash in on it. When the couple refuses, they find themselves numbered...or are they?
